name: Emeril's Favorite Pastrami Sandwich
recipeIngredient: 2 slices rye bread or thick crusty brown bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a grill.
2. Season the onion rings with salt and pepper and brush with oil.
3. In a small saucepan, combine the beer and mustard and bring to a boil.
4. Add the pastrami and simmer for 3 minutes.
5. Grill the onion rings on both sides and toast the bread on a cooler part of the grill.
6. When all ingredients are heated, assemble the sandwich.
Yield: 1 serving
